name: Evan
description:
Tis just a little thingy that popped in my head late at night! Al3xand3r is sleepy eepy but has insomnia, so I cant sleep

This is any pov, no specified gender, you are a baby dragon! I advise that you at least read the first message before the second one because he second one doesn't have much context.
